title: Deploy Sagrai Village Digital Platform permanently to Internet Computer

requirements.text: Deploy the Sagrai Village Digital Platform (frontend and backend canisters) permanently to the Internet Computer mainnet so the application is accessible at a stable, permanent ICP URL without expiration.
acceptanceCriteria: The backend Motoko canister is deployed to the Internet Computer mainnet and assigned a stable canister ID.
The frontend assets canister is deployed to the Internet Computer mainnet and served at a permanent ic0.app URL.
The application is accessible via the permanent URL without requiring a local replica.
All existing features (crop marketplace, notices, gallery, orders, contact, admin panel) remain fully functional after deployment.
Internet Identity authentication continues to work on the mainnet deployment.

constraints: Do not alter any existing application logic, data models, or UI during the deployment process.
Preserve all existing stable state and data structures in the backend canister.
nonGoals: Redesigning or modifying any frontend UI components.
Migrating to a different hosting platform or cloud provider.
